---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Checklist
- [ ] Searched for existing issues and discussions to avoid duplicates
- [ ] Reviewed the project roadmap (if available) to ensure alignment
- [ ] Confirmed the feature isn't already implemented or planned

## Feature Description
<!-- A clear description of the feature you'd like to see added -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Possible Solutions
<!-- Any ideas or approaches for implementing this feature -->

## Alternatives
<!-- Any alternative solutions you've considered -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any mockups, examples, or references -->
